name: Caraxes
impact_notes: This screenshot confirms Caraxes can participate in 3/3 Spearmen and Cavalry affinity armies.
Caraxes should not be treated as unresolved for gold-standard army generation anymore.
Archers are not confirmed for Caraxes, so do not place Caraxes in Syrax Archer engines unless a future screenshot confirms Archer affinity.
Because Caraxes has Infernal Burst and high Intelligence, he should be tested as a Fire finisher in Cavalry and Spearmen engines.
